chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6679 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.28491/2020 2. For hearing of main case 14.03.2025 Mr. Arshad Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Tahir Khalil advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel show cause notice has been impugned herein, however, the same shall be contested by the petitioner before the issuing authority. Learned counsel places reliance on the judgment of this Court dated 11.03.2021 passed in CPD 5552 of 2020 and others and states that in view thereof the show cause notices prima facie unwarranted. Be that as it may, he seeks that the notice be adjudicated vide speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
